scripts.dev: pnpm run dev:server & pnpm run dev:client
scripts.build: cd client && pnpm run build && cd ../server && pnpm run build
scripts.typecheck: cd server && pnpm run typecheck && cd ../client && pnpm run typecheck
scripts.lint: cd server && pnpm run lint && cd ../client && pnpm run lint
scripts.format: cd server && pnpm run format && cd ../client && pnpm run format
scripts.format:check: cd server && pnpm run format:check && cd ../client && pnpm run format:check
